title: FA 牌照只发给公司 / Licence only to a corporation
point: FA 牌照只发给在新加坡设立实体存在的公司,不发给个人。 / A financial adviser's licence is granted only to a corporation with a physical presence in Singapore, not to individuals.
keyfacts: 依 FAA 第 64 条 / Issued under s.64 FAA
至少 2 名全职委任代表 / At least 2 full-time appointed representatives
sourceRef: FAA-G01 — Criteria for the Grant of a FA's Licence

title: 实缴资本门槛 / Paid-up capital thresholds
point: 一般 FA 服务 $150,000;涉及期货/即期外汇/货币 OTC 衍生品或组合则 $300,000。 / $150,000 for general FA services; $300,000 where futures, spot FX or currency OTC derivatives, or a combination, are involved.
keyfacts: FAR 第 15 条 / FAR reg.15
外资公司为同额净总部资金 / Net head office funds for a foreign company

title: 专业责任险 PII / Professional Indemnity Insurance
point: 须持独立非混合 PII,保额不低于 $500,000,免赔额不超过上一财年净资产值的 20%。 / A standalone non-hybrid PII with indemnity ≥ $500,000 and a deductible no more than 20% of net asset value at the end of the immediately preceding financial year.
keyfacts: FAR 第 17 条 / FAR reg.17
Group PII 须达独立非混合 PII 的至少 5 倍 / Group PII ≥ 5× the standalone quantum

title: CEO/ED 经验与持股 / CEO/ED experience and shareholding
point: CEO 与 ED 至少 5 年相关经验(含 3 年管理);若无 3 年往绩,CEO 须持股≥20%,CEO+ED 合计≥50%。 / CEO and EDs need ≥ 5 years' relevant experience (3 managerial); absent a 3-year track record, the CEO must hold ≥ 20% and CEO+EDs together ≥ 50%.
keyfacts: 3 年财务顾问业务往绩 / 3-year proven track record

title: Fit & Proper 三准则 / Three fit-and-proper criteria
point: 诚实正直与声誉、能力与胜任、财务稳健;举证责任在相关人士自身。 / Honesty/integrity/reputation, competence/capability, and financial soundness; the onus is on the relevant person to establish it.
keyfacts: 未满足任一准则不必然自动拒绝 / Failing one criterion is not an automatic refusal

title: 雇用被禁止令者属违法 / Employing a PO holder is an offence
point: 在禁止令(PO)有效期内雇用被发 PO 的人,违反 SFA 第 101B 条与 FAA 第 60 条。 / Employing a person while a prohibition order against him is in effect is an offence under s.101B SFA and s.60 FAA.
keyfacts: 须查 MAS 公开代表登记册 / Check MAS' Public Register of Representatives

title: 虚假陈述罚则 / Penalty for false statement
point: 个人向 principal 提供虚假/误导性重大陈述并随后呈交 MAS,定罪罚款不超过 $50,000。 / An individual who gives a false/misleading statement in a material particular to his principal, later lodged with MAS, is liable on conviction to a fine not exceeding $50,000.
keyfacts: SFA 第 99O 条与 FAA 第 23L 条 / s.99O SFA & s.23L FAA

title: 自我声明必要但不充分 / Self-declaration necessary but insufficient
point: 代表自我声明是必要但不充分的尽调措施,FI 仍须独立核验文件与查册。 / A representative's self-declaration is a necessary but insufficient due-diligence measure; the FI must still verify documents and conduct independent checks.
keyfacts: 应定期(如每年)重做声明与检查 / Re-declare and re-check periodically (e.g. annually)

title: FAA-G04 操守与披露 / Conduct and disclosure
point: FA 须正直、客观、保密、有能力、谨慎勤勉,并向客户披露产品关键特征与全部报酬。 / FAs must act with integrity, objectivity, confidentiality, competence and due diligence, and disclose key product features and all remuneration to clients.
keyfacts: 寿险产品披露 Benefit Illustration 中的 distribution cost 即可 / For a life policy, disclosing the BI distribution cost suffices

title: 合理依据与 KYC / Reasonable basis and KYC
point: 推荐前须查明客户目标/风险/状况/经验/需要,建议须有合理依据且适合客户,不得以佣金回扣作推荐依据。 / Determine the client's objectives, risk, situation, experience and needs; recommendations must have a reasonable basis, be suitable, and never be based on a rebate of commissions.
keyfacts: 须保存记录并由管理层复核 / Keep records reviewed by management

title: 使用 Independent 的条件 / Conditions to use "independent"
point: 依 FAR 第 21 条,须无造成产品偏向的佣金/利益、无直接或间接产品限制、无关联产品供应商的利益冲突。 / Under FAR reg.21: no commission/benefit creating product bias, no direct or indirect product restriction, and no conflict from links to a product provider.
keyfacts: 每类投资产品代表少于 4 家供应商一般非独立 / Fewer than 4 providers per class is normally not independent
sourceRef: FAA-G05 — Use of the term "Independent"; FAR reg.21

title: 20% 显著性经验法则 / 20% significance rule of thumb
point: 佣金/利益超过总收入 20%,或不同类别佣金率差异超过 20%,一般视为显著。 / Commissions/benefits exceeding 20% of total revenue, or differences in commission rates exceeding 20%, are generally regarded as significant.
keyfacts: FA 本身为产品供应商不应自称独立 / An FA that is itself a product provider should not claim independence
